name: MikroTik hEX
title: MikroTik hEX | Getic
short_description: Dual Core 880MHz CPU, 256MB RAM, 5x GIGABIT LAN, USB, RouterOS L4
description: Designed for home and small office setups, these routers offer reliable wired connections via Ethernet cables. With PoE ports, you can power devices like access points and cameras through Ethernet. hEX S and hEX PoE also feature an SFP port for high-speed internet connections using optical cables. The RouterOS operating system by Mikrotik provides extensive network configuration and traffic management capabilities, ensuring a seamless and efficient networking experience.

detailed_description.heading: Introducing the hEX Series Routers
detailed_description.text: Designed for home and small office setups, these routers offer reliable wired connections via Ethernet cables. With PoE ports, you can power devices like access points and cameras through Ethernet. hEX S and hEX PoE also feature an SFP port for high-speed internet connections using optical cables. The RouterOS operating system by Mikrotik provides extensive network configuration and traffic management capabilities, ensuring a seamless and efficient networking experience.

detailed_description.heading: Versatile Networking Solution
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik hEX Series Gigabit Ethernet Router is a powerful and versatile networking device designed specifically for home and small office installations. If you require a reliable and efficient wired network setup without the need for wireless connectivity, the hEX router is the ideal choice. Its innovative features and performance enhancements make it a perfect fit for various networking applications.

detailed_description.heading: High-Performance Hardware
detailed_description.text: The hEX router is equipped with a robust dual-core 880MHz CPU and 256MB of RAM, ensuring seamless handling of advanced configurations supported by the RouterOS operating system, developed by MikroTik. Whether you are a networking enthusiast, a tech-savvy professional, or a small business owner, the hEX router's processing power guarantees smooth and efficient operation.

detailed_description.heading: Data Transfer & Storage
detailed_description.text: With five 1 Gbps Ethernet ports, the hEX router provides fast data transfer rates over wired connections. Connect computers, printers, and other compatible devices directly through Ethernet cables to experience a reliable and stable network with exceptional speeds for data-intensive tasks. The hEX router also features 16MB of storage memory, ensuring you have ample space for essential configurations and updates. Plus, its full-size USB port allows for easy file sharing, making it convenient for connecting external storage devices for additional data storage options.

detailed_description.heading: Security & File Storage
detailed_description.text: For even better file storage performance, the hEX router includes a microSD slot. Utilize this feature to enhance read/write speeds for file storage and provide better support for The Dude server package, ensuring efficient network management. Security is paramount in any network setup. The hEX router supports IPsec hardware encryption, providing secure communication for sensitive data and protecting your network from potential threats.

comments.name: Wilko
comments.text: A lot of router for the money. RouterOS is very powerful and robust. Pleasure to work with.

comments.name: Jason
comments.text: Good value for money for security

comments.name: Stefan
comments.text: Very good router. Also very fast shipping. Thank you Getic.

comments.name: Aurelijus
comments.text: I am satisfied with my purchase. It met my expectations.
